question: Choose the correct word: The difference in price was ________ — you could barely tell which one was more expensive.
Fill in the blank: Does the idea of a life ________ appeal to you, or do you prefer staying in one place?
Choose the correct word: The room felt very ________ — it had no windows and the ceiling was very low.
Fill in the blank: The carpenter ________ the leaking pipe and now it works perfectly.

Read the passage and answer the question.

'Professor Ellen Pader from the University of Massachusetts, who has published research on the impact of space on relationships, believes a major benefit of sharing space with others is that you learn respect for other people, and you also learn to negotiate with people, instead of just withdrawing when things get difficult. In many western countries, there is an assumption that we all need privacy, but this is not a universally shared belief.'

According to Professor Pader, what happens when people share space?
choices: They become more isolated and withdrawn
They learn respect and how to negotiate with others
They feel more stressed and uncomfortable

question: Choose the correct modal: There could ________ life on other planets. Scientists are still investigating.
Fill in the blank: Could you ________ the broken light bulb? It needs to be changed before tonight.
Choose the correct article: He went to ________ school near his home every day. (the building, not the institution)
Fill in the blank: The window was left open and the rain came in, creating a large ________ on the floor.
Choose the correct modal: We are ________ to come to school on time. The headteacher expects it.
Fill in the blank: This film is ________ to win a number of awards. The critics love it.
Choose the correct word: If you had to move to another country, what would help you to ________ in the new place?
Fill in the blank: You ________ use the stairs in case of fire. The lifts are not safe.
Choose the correct option: 'The cushions don't go with the sofa.' Replace 'the sofa' with a pronoun: 'The cushions don't go ________.'
Fill in the blank: The first ________ you do is turn off the main power switch before touching any wires.
Choose the correct article: ________ Egyptian pyramids are a very popular tourist attraction.
Fill in the blank: Crew members in the NASA experiment were not ________ to leave the capsule unless wearing a spacesuit.
Choose the correct option: 'I'd advise you not to ________' is used when ________.
choices: telling someone to take action immediately

question: Fill in the blank: ________ a few students expressed a wish for storage lockers in the common room.
Choose the correct word: Her jumper ________ because she washed it at 90 degrees.
Fill in the blank: The masking ________ helps you paint straight lines on the wall.
Choose the correct option: We ________ call the plumber. I can't fix this leaking pipe myself.
Fill in the blank: In Tokyo, many people live in apartments smaller than ________ square metres.
Choose the correct article: He had ________ dream of becoming an architect from a very early age.
Fill in the blank: After cleaning, use a ________ to pick up any fine dust or small broken pieces from the floor.
Choose the correct modal: She couldn't visit us last month. This expresses ________.
Fill in the blank: The passive house uses a special device that takes old, wet air from the house and replaces it with ________ air.
Choose the correct option: 'Some people commented that ________' is an example of ________ language used in reports.
Fill in the blank: The students ________ of the opinion that the chairs were heavy and should be replaced.
Choose the correct modal: Actors ________ be glamorous. It's not a requirement of the job.
Fill in the blank: In Sweden, if you are caught dropping litter, you will ________ pay a fine.
Choose the correct option: 'Switch it off' — the pronoun 'it' must go ________ the verb and the particle.
Fill in the blank: When/once you've done that, ________ the surfaces with a clean, dry cloth.
Choose the correct article: He's been in ________ hospital for two weeks now. (the institution — not a specific building)
Fill in the blank: The report language 'Regarding wall colour, ________ three quarters of students had no strong feelings' uses a quantifier.
Choose the correct option: 'We've run out of toothpaste.' The phrasal verb 'run out of' is ________.
Fill in the blank: The tiny home movement has become a big ________ in some parts of the world, giving rise to a new social trend.
Choose the correct word: 'Are not allowed to' and 'were ________ to' both express prohibition.
Fill in the blank: The house was ________ — neither too small nor too large — just right for a family of four.
Choose the correct option: 'The best solution would ________ to be...' is used at the end of a report.
